metadata.privacy_note: This dataset is entirely synthetic and contains no personally identifiable information (PII). All IDs, names, and descriptions are fabricated for evaluation purposes only.

complaints.title: Pothole on main road near junction
complaints.description: A large pothole has formed near the junction causing vehicle damage. Multiple residents have complained about the hazard. Immediate repair is requested.

complaints.title: Garbage not collected for two weeks
complaints.description: Garbage bins have not been emptied for over two weeks. The area is becoming a health hazard with overflowing waste.

complaints.title: No water supply for three days
complaints.description: Residents in the sector have had no water supply for three consecutive days. Repeated calls to the helpline have gone unanswered.

complaints.title: Frequent power cuts in residential area
complaints.description: Power outages are occurring multiple times daily lasting several hours each. This has disrupted work and daily life significantly.

complaints.title: Broken streetlight causing safety concerns
complaints.description: A streetlight on the main avenue has been non-functional for two weeks. The dark stretch is a safety concern for pedestrians.

complaints.title: Bus route cancelled without prior notice
complaints.description: Route 47B has been cancelled without any announcement. Commuters are stranded and late for work daily.

complaints.title: Clinic closed during official working hours
complaints.description: The local primary health clinic was found closed during official working hours on multiple occasions. Patients requiring routine care are being turned away.

complaints.title: School building roof leaking during rain
complaints.description: The roof of the primary school leaks heavily during rainfall. Classes are being disrupted and students are at risk.

complaints.title: Drain overflowing near residential colony
complaints.description: The main storm drain near the colony is overflowing and causing waterlogging in adjacent streets.

complaints.title: Bridge railing damaged and dangerous
complaints.description: The railing on the pedestrian bridge has been broken for a month. A child nearly fell through the gap last week.

complaints.title: Water supply contaminated with foul odour
complaints.description: Tap water has a strong foul odour and appears discoloured. Residents are unable to use it for drinking or cooking.

complaints.title: Transformer sparking near playground
complaints.description: An electrical transformer near the children's playground has been sparking. This poses a severe safety risk.

complaints.title: Footpath blocked by unauthorised construction
complaints.description: An unauthorised structure has been built over the footpath forcing pedestrians onto the road. Multiple accidents have almost occurred.

complaints.title: Bus stop shelter in dilapidated condition
complaints.description: The shelter at the central bus stop has a collapsed roof. Commuters are exposed to the elements while waiting.

complaints.title: Medical waste dumped near residential street
complaints.description: Bags of medical waste have been dumped illegally on a residential street creating a public health emergency.

complaints.title: Lack of teachers at government school
complaints.description: Three teacher positions at the government school have been vacant for months. Upper grade classes have not been taught core subjects.

complaints.title: Open manhole on busy pedestrian road
complaints.description: An uncovered manhole has been left open on a busy pedestrian road for several days. Accidents are likely if not addressed urgently.

complaints.title: Water pipe burst flooding the road
complaints.description: A main water pipe has burst and is flooding the road. Significant water is being wasted and traffic is disrupted.

complaints.title: Electric poles leaning dangerously over road
complaints.description: Two electric poles are leaning at a dangerous angle over the main road. Strong winds could cause them to fall.

complaints.title: Stray dogs attacking pedestrians in market
complaints.description: A pack of aggressive stray dogs has been attacking pedestrians near the market area. Several people have been injured.

complaints.title: Bus drivers speeding through school zone
complaints.description: Multiple residents have observed public buses speeding through the school zone during pick-up and drop-off hours. This is a serious safety hazard.

complaints.title: Hospital ward lacks essential medicines
complaints.description: The general ward of the public hospital is reporting a shortage of essential medicines for over a week. Patients are being asked to purchase medicines privately.

complaints.title: School toilets non-functional for a month
complaints.description: All toilets in the government school have been non-functional for over a month. Students are unable to use sanitation facilities during school hours.

complaints.title: Road cave-in after heavy rainfall
complaints.description: A significant cave-in has occurred on the arterial road following heavy rainfall. One lane is entirely blocked.

complaints.title: Sewage smell in drinking water supply
complaints.description: Residents report a sewage-like smell from the drinking water supply. There may be a cross-contamination in the pipeline.

complaints.title: Meter tampering suspected in residential block
complaints.description: Residents suspect electricity meter tampering after receiving abnormally high bills for three consecutive months.

complaints.title: Fire hazard due to burning garbage pile
complaints.description: A large garbage pile near the warehousing area has caught fire creating a smoke hazard. The fire department was called but the issue recurs.

complaints.title: Metro station lift out of order
complaints.description: The passenger lift at the metro station has been non-functional for two weeks. Elderly and disabled commuters are significantly inconvenienced.

complaints.title: Vaccination camp cancelled without notice
complaints.description: A scheduled child vaccination camp was cancelled without any prior notice or alternate date provided. Parents had taken leave from work to attend.

complaints.title: Mid-day meal not served to students
complaints.description: The mid-day meal scheme has not been operational at the primary school for over a week. Students from low-income families are being denied a nutritious meal.

complaint_events.remarks: Pothole reported by citizen near the main junction.
Complaint assigned to roads maintenance team.
Repair crew dispatched to location.
Initial patching done, final levelling pending.
Pothole fully repaired and road resurfaced.
Garbage overflow reported by citizen.
Sanitation supervisor assigned to inspect.
Garbage truck scheduled for emergency clearance.
Area cleared and regular schedule restored.
Water supply outage reported by citizen.
Water utility engineer assigned to investigate.
Fault identified in distribution valve.
Valve replacement parts ordered.
Valve replaced and water supply fully restored.
Repeated power cuts reported by citizen.
Electrical department notified and assigned.
Overloaded substation identified as root cause.
Load balancing work in progress.
Substation upgraded and power supply stabilised.
Non-functional streetlight reported by citizen.
Street lighting crew assigned.
Faulty bulb and wiring identified.
Streetlight repaired and functioning normally.
Bus route cancellation reported by commuter.
Transport authority notified and assigned.
Route reinstatement being coordinated with depot.
Temporary alternate route arranged for commuters.
Original route fully restored.
Clinic closure during working hours reported.
Health department officer assigned to investigate.
Site visit conducted and staff shortfall confirmed.
Additional staff deployed and clinic operating normally.
Leaking school roof reported by parent.
Education department engineer assigned.
Roof damage assessed; repair material procured.
Partial repair completed; full waterproofing pending.
Full roof repair and waterproofing completed.
Overflowing drain reported by resident.
Drainage maintenance crew assigned.
Drain blockage identified and clearance begun.
Drain fully cleared and overflow resolved.
Damaged bridge railing reported by citizen.
Bridge maintenance team assigned.
Site inspection completed; materials ordered.
Temporary barricading placed for safety.
Railing fully replaced and bridge reopened.
Contaminated water supply reported by resident.
Water quality team assigned for testing.
Water samples collected and sent for lab analysis.
Sparking transformer near playground reported.
Emergency electrical team assigned.
Transformer isolated and safety barriers erected.
Blocked footpath reported by pedestrian.
Encroachment removal team assigned.
Dilapidated bus stop shelter reported.
Civic infrastructure team assigned.
Damage assessment completed; repair estimate submitted.
Materials procurement in progress; work delayed.
Medical waste dumping reported by resident.
Health and sanitation team assigned.
Site secured; waste removal and disposal underway.
Teacher vacancies reported by school representative.
Education department HR officer assigned.
Open manhole on pedestrian road reported.
Urban services crew assigned for immediate action.
Safety cones placed and manhole cover sourced.
Manhole covered and road cleared.
Burst water pipe and road flooding reported.
Emergency water works team assigned.
Water supply shut off and excavation started.
Pipe replacement in progress; area partially restored.
Pipe replaced, road restored, supply resumed.
Leaning electric poles reported by resident.
Electrical infrastructure team assigned.
Poles secured with temporary support; permanent fix scheduled.
Stray dog attacks in market area reported by citizen.
Animal control unit assigned.
Animal control team conducting rounds in the area.
Several dogs captured; sterilisation programme initiated.
Bus speeding in school zone reported by parent.
Traffic enforcement officer assigned to monitor.
Medicine shortage at public hospital reported.
District health officer assigned to investigate.
Emergency medicine stock requisition placed.
Medicine stock replenished and supply normalised.
Non-functional school toilets reported by teacher.
School maintenance contractor assigned.
Plumbing inspection done; parts procured.
All toilet facilities repaired and operational.
Road cave-in after heavy rain reported by driver.
Roads department emergency team assigned.
Affected area barricaded and repair work started.
Sewage smell in water supply reported by resident.
Water and sewage engineering team assigned.
Pipeline inspection for cross-contamination underway.
Cross-connection found; isolation valve installed.
Suspected meter tampering reported by residents.
Electrical audit team assigned.
Burning garbage pile and fire hazard reported.
Fire safety and sanitation teams assigned.
Fire extinguished and hazardous waste removed.
Area cleared; enforcement notice issued to violators.
Site clean, monitoring in place to prevent recurrence.
Non-functional metro lift reported by commuter.
Metro maintenance team assigned.
Lift motor fault diagnosed; parts ordered.
Lift repaired and operational after parts replacement.
Cancelled vaccination camp reported by parent.
Health programme coordinator assigned.
Rescheduling of vaccination camp underway.
Vaccination camp rescheduled and successfully conducted.
Mid-day meal scheme suspension reported by teacher.
School welfare officer assigned to investigate.
Supply chain disruption identified; alternate vendor being sourced.
